title: TokyoGhoul
description: This is a mod inspired by Tokyo Ghoul.
body:
![Tokyo Ghoul Logo in Japanese](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a513a04638e945950be83863f0ab7ec33bae34aa.png)

## How to become Ghoul
Make and Eat Kagune.

## How to use Kagune
- R key              : Activate / Deactivate
- Right Click        : Normal Attack
- Shift + Right Click: Special Attack
- V key              : Acceleration
- G key              : Search

## Setting Ghoul Face
Put your Ghoul Face on the top left of Skin.
